name: gh-736-tasksmeta-desync-retry-storm
description: Mid-fleet plugin bump regenerated tasks.md but tasksMeta was never rebuilt: the persisted pointer said task 5 was 'context-inject (done)' while tasks.md task 5 was a different task. /work looped 34+ TDD retries pulling a nonexistent test file; the hook-protected state file had no operator bypass.

baseRun.notes: test file from the stale task pointer does not exist under the current plan

headRun.notes: could-not-find errors; retry counter climbing with no diff delta (34+ identical retries)

expected.rationale: The task-as-recorded references a deliverable that cannot exist under the current plan (missing deliverable outside any resolvable scope); retrying the same dispatch can never succeed — plan state must be reconciled.

provenance.notes: Version skew 3.69->3.74; recovery required a hand edit (.bak-preresync). GH-753's resync-meta is the escalate-adjacent recovery for this class; the verifier routes it to reopen-artifact instead of infinite retry.
